authority_policy.fail_closed_rule: Missing, unresolved, conflicting, unknown, or pattern-incomplete colour authority blocks runtime export.
authority_policy.pattern_orientation_rule: If S-57/S-52 semantics require horizontal, vertical, diagonal, checkered, or border pattern evidence, the selected SVG must carry matching data-pattern evidence before runtime eligibility.
authority_policy.renderer_rule: Preserve feature predicates for audit/crosswalks. Use render_colour_authority to decide which colour sequence a renderer may bake for a generated visual recipe.
authority_policy.s101_witness_rule: S-101 witnesses may support shape/rule evidence but are not colour-authoritative unless the row contract says so.
authority_policy.visual_colour_sequence: ordered CSS fill tokens from the selected generated Helm SVG; stroke tokens are used when no fill tokens exist
